text:
Market today: Geopolitical heat is the story. Iran tightening the Strait of Hormuz and drone attacks on ships push oil higher, which historically rattles growth/tech sentiment and spooks risk-on positioning. Add Trump's new 100% digital-services-tariff threat, which hits global tech trade flows directly — your chip and software names feel that.

Your holdings: AVGO (-14.58%, largest position, TRIM flag) is your biggest dollar risk — on margin, that hole gets deeper fast, stop at 336. PLTR (-13.26%, SELL flag) is flashing red and has the farthest to fall before your 85 stop. SPCX is a brand-new, very volatile IPO with limited price history — margin amplifies any gap-down overnight. SPAL (-12.74%) is a 2x leveraged ETF that decays daily; holding it while down this much on margin is a double drag.

Watch: 1) Oil price direction — sustained move up pressures growth multiples across your whole book. 2) Any retaliation or escalation in the Strait; that's the switch that flips sentiment fast.

Bottom line: Margin plus four positions already bleeding means your first job today is sizing down the losers, not waiting for a bounce.
